scenarios.title: Scenario1_DeviceConnect
scenarios.description: This scenario shows how to locate a HID device and open a handle to the device.

controls.inner_text: This scenario demonstrates how to use feature report to set/get the LED blink pattern of the SuperMUTT device
This scenario shows how to register for an event using the HidDevice. If the device is disconnected and reconnected, you must reregister for the event because it is not automatically done.
This scenario shows how to read and write to the device using input and output reports.
